value.found_quote: Subagents run asynchronously in the background, allowing the parent agent to delegate a task and immediately resume its own work. At any point, a subagent exists in one of three states: ... 1. Running ... 2. Idle ... 3. Killed
value.rationale: The page explicitly contains a section titled "Subagent Lifecycle and States" which states that subagents run asynchronously and exist in one of three states: Running, Idle, or Killed — directly matching all elements of the claim. The page does not indicate this feature is in preview, deprecated, or sunset.
